prs.title: Add feedr - terminal-based RSS/Atom feed reader with TUI
prs.body:
* Link to your project (GitHub/crates.io): https://github.com/bahdotsh/feedr

* Description (optional):  A terminal-based RSS/Atom feed reader with a TUI.

* Screenshot or gif (strongly recommended): [demo](https://github.com/bahdotsh/feedr/blob/main/demo.gif)
